allow: Bash(unzip -p "1_WPE_AD-WORDS - 3 - Adwords Mega-Auswertung 90 Tage und Massnahmenplan 23-02-2026_FINAL.docx" word/document.xml)
Bash(node -e "try { require\(''./workbench-data.js''\); console.log\(''OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''ERROR:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''SZ_AKTIV count:'', SZ_AKTIV.length\); console.log\(''SZ total:'', SZ.length\); [''sz200'',''sz201'',''sz202'',''sz44'',''sz40'',''sz41''].forEach\(function\(id\){var found=false;for\(var i=0;i<SZ.length;i++\){if\(SZ[i].id===id\){found=true;break;}}console.log\(id, found?''IN SZ'':''NOT IN SZ''\);var inAktiv=false;for\(var j=0;j<SZ_AKTIV.length;j++\){if\(SZ_AKTIV[j].id===id\){inAktiv=true;break;}}console.log\(''  in SZ_AKTIV:'', inAktiv\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); [''sz44'',''sz40'',''sz41'',''sz200'',''sz201'',''sz202''].forEach\(function\(id\){var sz;for\(var i=0;i<SZ.length;i++\){if\(SZ[i].id===id\){sz=SZ[i];break;}} if\(sz\){console.log\(id,''co keys:'',Object.keys\(sz.co\),''fn keys:'',Object.keys\(sz.fn\)\);} else {console.log\(id,''NOT FOUND''\);} }\);")

Bash(node -e "eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''SCORES type:'', typeof SCORES\); console.log\(''SCORES keys count:'', Object.keys\(SCORES\).length\); console.log\(''CRITERIA type:'', typeof CRITERIA\); console.log\(''LW_CRITERIA type:'', typeof LW_CRITERIA\); console.log\(''LW_CRITERIA length:'', LW_CRITERIA.length\);")

Bash(node -e "eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''KONZEPTE:'', KONZEPTE.length, KONZEPTE.map\(function\(k\){return k.id}\)\); console.log\(''KONZEPTE_ARCHIVED:'', KONZEPTE_ARCHIVED.length, KONZEPTE_ARCHIVED.map\(function\(k\){return k.id}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''V2_RAW_SUM:'', V2_RAW_SUM\); console.log\(''Changed criteria:''\); CRITERIA_V2.forEach\(function\(c\){if\([''K12.1'',''K12.2'',''K13.2'',''K7.6'',''K7.7'',''K8.2''].indexOf\(c.id\)>=0\) console.log\('' '',c.id, ''raw:'', c.raw, ''weight:'', Math.round\(c.weight*10\)/10+''%''\);}\); console.log\(''KONZEPTE_SCORES:''\); for\(var k in KONZEPTE_SCORES\){console.log\('' '',k,''fullScore:'',KONZEPTE_SCORES[k]._fullScore,''lwScore:'',KONZEPTE_SCORES[k]._lwScore\);}")

Bash(node -e "eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); var lwSum=0; CRITERIA_V2.forEach\(function\(c\){if\(c.lw\) lwSum+=c.raw;}\); console.log\(''LW_RAW_SUM:'', lwSum\); console.log\(''V2_RAW_SUM:'', V2_RAW_SUM\);")

Bash(node -e "try { eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''JS OK''\); console.log\(''BEREICH_A count:'', BEREICH_A_CRITERIA.length, ''raw sum:'', BEREICH_A_RAW_SUM\); console.log\(''BEREICH_B count:'', BEREICH_B_CRITERIA.length, ''raw sum:'', BEREICH_B_RAW_SUM\); console.log\(''KONZEPTE count:'', KONZEPTE.length\); console.log\(''KONZEPTE_SCORES keys:'', Object.keys\(KONZEPTE_SCORES\)\); Object.keys\(KONZEPTE_SCORES\).forEach\(function\(k\){ var s=KONZEPTE_SCORES[k]; console.log\(k, ''_aScore:'', s._aScore, ''label:'', s._label?s._label.text:''?'', ''KO:'', s._ko?s._ko.length:0\); }\); console.log\(''BEREICH_B_DATA count:'', BEREICH_B_DATA.length\); BEREICH_B_DATA.forEach\(function\(b\){ console.log\(b.id, b.name, ''ist:'', b.ist, ''pot:'', b.potenzial, ''anw keys:'', Object.keys\(b.anweisungen||{}\)\); }\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message, e.stack\); }")

Bash(node -e "try { eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''workbench-data.js'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''JS OK''\); console.log\(''KONZEPTE:'', KONZEPTE.length\); KONZEPTE.forEach\(function\(k\){console.log\('' '',k.mszNr,k.name,k.id\)}\); console.log\(''SCORES:''\); Object.keys\(KONZEPTE_SCORES\).forEach\(function\(k\){var s=KONZEPTE_SCORES[k]; console.log\('' '',k,''A-Score:'',s._aScore,''Label:'',s._label.text,''KO:'',s._ko.length\)}\); console.log\(''B-DATA anweisungen check:''\); var missing=[]; BEREICH_B_DATA.forEach\(function\(b\){KONZEPTE.forEach\(function\(k\){if\(!b.anweisungen[k.id]\)missing.push\(b.id+''/''+k.id\)}\)}\); if\(missing.length\) console.log\(''MISSING:'',missing\); else console.log\(''All B-anweisungen present for all 5 Markenbilder''\); } catch\(e\){console.error\(''ERROR:'',e.message\)}")
